flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at NUC University rose 84% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $12.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at NUC University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.0k → $13.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at NUC University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (62.7% → 54.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at NUC University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).
